falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Maybe waiting longer will naturally recover the scientifically invalid rubric_critic runs.
falsificationQueries: Compare multiple live status snapshots over time
Inspect representative target state for pending versus exhausted work
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Later snapshots showed more score-stage completions but the same 16 rubric_critic runs remained scientifically invalid and stuck on exhausted targets. Official Convex scheduling docs do not imply automatic recovery from application-level exhausted states.
